The '''''Crimson Axe''''' was the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Rav]] that later served as his permanent headquarters.

==Characteristics==
The ''Crimson Axe'' had a vertical configuration, with the command and control decks mounted on top. The hull was heavily armored, and had a wedge shape. It was often used to ram vehicles to board or disable them.

It had several [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]], with the main hangar being on the front of the vessel. The main hangar was protected by armored doors. The auxiliary hangars were aft-facing, and were on the decks below the main engines. Although [[Rav]] encouraged the idea that the ''Crimson Axe'' was still operational, it is unknown if the ship was still capable of flight after being grounded in the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] pit on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]].

==History==
[[File:Crimsonaxe.jpg|thumb|left|150px|''Crimson Axe'' in profile]]

The ''Crimson Axe'' was used by the [[Bloody Bones]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] to attack ships and settlements throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was also used to ransack defeated military bases or pick through the debris field left by massive space battles.

It was the ship that found [[Cade Skywalker]] floating in space above [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] following the [[Massacre at Ossus]] in [[130 ABY]]. Skywalker and [[Jariah Syn]] worked onboard the ship as part of Rav's pirate crew.

By [[137 ABY]], the ''Axe'' was located in an old [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] [[Sarlacc's Peak|pit]] high above the [[Killee Wasteland]] of [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]], having been converted into a stationary base of operations. That year, Syn, Skywalker, and [[Deliah Blue]] brought [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] [[Naxy Screeger]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Hosk Trey'lis]] to the ''Axe'', turning the pair over to Rav for the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on their heads.

The ''Crimson Axe'' contained the [[Golden Gorg Cantina]].
